Notes: WIAC opener for both teams...UWO scored the first nine points of the first
half and 12 of the first 14 of the second...UWP went without a basket from
11:08 to 1:43 of the second half, outscored 20-6...UWO's Neustifter has 14
points and eight assists, both career highs...UWO's Stecker has double-double.
Game.Officials: John Furrer,  Duane Ives,  Steve Maluszewski
